subject: SurfaceSignalDecal
adopted_concept: Top-down readable surface signal decals for exploration tool targets, route opening, reward spawn, and lock break feedback.
product_line_role: Grounding Detail / Route Surface VFX decal
motif_limit_policy: Regional material hints stay below 15%; no standalone plant, pipe, crystal forest, crown, text, or external-IP motif.

asset_request.source: inferred because no visual asset_request.yaml was present in the checkout for this VFX/decal family
out_of_scope_asset_requests: Assets/Art/ModelRigAnimation/Enemy/MeleeShardling/SealedLockRelic_v0.1.0/asset_request.yaml is a model/rig animation request and was not used for this decal request.
asset_request.usage_context: FOURFOLD ECHOES exploration tool target response, route opening floor cue, reward spawn readback, and lock break/gate surface feedback

prompt_contract:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: Unity VFX/decal texture family plus 3D material atlas maps
Primary request: compact FOURFOLD ECHOES surface signal decals for tool target, route open, reward bloom, and lock break, no text, no background
Style/medium: procedural 2D raster decal, folded reliquary miniature product line
Subject: four floor/gate readable signal decals built from low folded slab rings, fourfold inlays, chunky chip tabs, and one functional signal thread
Composition/framing: centered top-down decal silhouette, transparent padding, readable at 64px, 128px, and 256px
Color palette: controlled ivory stone dust, warm gold reward, cool tool blue, route teal, restrained lock red with cool shadow support
Materials/textures: broad stylized PBR planes, sparse bevel-like normal detail, no photoreal grime, no noisy fantasy texture
Constraints: transparent PNG, no labels, no letters, no background plate, no cast shadow, variations differ by outline, socket, weak/open point, material temperature, and signal placement rather than color alone
Avoid: generic map pin, quest marker, magic circle clutter, runic text, external IP style names, fine decorative clutter, watermark

unity_import.texture_type: Sprite (2D and UI) for individual decals; Default/Normal Map for atlas maps as needed

texture_maps.Mask_channels: R=silhouette/occlusion, G=material roughness group, B=emissive mask, A=alpha

variants.name: ToolTarget
variants.difference: open targeting lens, four stepped aim tabs, cool blue signal thread from tool socket

variants.name: RouteOpen
variants.difference: split-open route silhouette, offset gate slit, teal path thread across one side

variants.name: RewardBloom
variants.difference: chunky reward bloom tabs, central reliquary cup, warm gold signal points

variants.name: LockBreak
variants.difference: broken lock ring with separated heavy tabs, red fracture signal and visible weak/open gap

qc.edge_bleed: none detected in alpha-corner and edge checks after inset pass
qc.tile_seam: not applicable; decals and atlas, not loop tiles
